realized_profit.name: Realized Profit
realized_profit.description: Total profit or loss from closed positions.
realized_profit.calculation: Sum of (Exit Price - Entry Price) * Quantity for all closed trades.

unrealized_profit.name: Unrealized Profit
unrealized_profit.description: Current profit or loss from open positions.
unrealized_profit.calculation: Sum of (Mark Price - Entry Price) * Quantity for all open positions.

win_rate.name: Win Rate
win_rate.description: Percentage of closed trades that resulted in a profit > 0.

sharpe_ratio.name: Sharpe Ratio
sharpe_ratio.formula: (Mean Daily PnL / StdDev Daily PnL) * Sqrt(365)

wallet.description: A blockchain wallet address interacting with the Sodex protocol.
